message:
fix: fused_count mismatch, Hybrid provenance overwrite, PID dedup

searcher: fused_count in PhaseMetrics for Initial phase reported
initial_hits.len() (full pre-truncation count) instead of
display_hits.len() (the actual top-k returned to callers). Dashboards
and telemetry consumers comparing metrics.fused_count with results.len()
would see a mismatch.

searcher: Hybrid ScoreSource (lexical + semantic via RRF) was
overwritten to SemanticQuality during quality refinement, same class of
provenance-erasure bug as the previously fixed Lexical case. Now both
Lexical and Hybrid provenance are preserved through refinement.

lifecycle/concurrency: Deduplicated identical is_pid_alive/pid_is_alive
functions. concurrency::is_pid_alive promoted to pub(crate), lifecycle
delegates to it. Eliminates divergence risk.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
